actionUnits.condition: Physics trigger enter on BoxCollider (id: 265568267, isTrigger: true) of Elevator (1). Ensure a Rigidbody object assigned to 'player' (fileID: 7425022) intersects the trigger so Unity invokes AttachToElevator.OnTriggerEnter on MonoBehaviour id: 265568265 (Script GUID: 077cb2d6a53b18f4ea7d76e72138fc77). Note: The scene’s MonoBehaviour settings match the provided script (player = fileID 7425022). Given the code checks (gameObject == player), and 'player' is not Elevator (1), expect no SetParent to occur.

Physics trigger exit on BoxCollider (id: 265568267). Ensure the same Rigidbody 'player' (fileID: 7425022) exits the trigger so Unity invokes AttachToElevator.OnTriggerExit on MonoBehaviour id: 265568265 (Script GUID: 077cb2d6a53b18f4ea7d76e72138fc77). Due to (gameObject == player) check, expect no unparenting to occur.
